## Description

<!-- Briefly describe the change and why it's needed. If it addresses an issue, link it. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] test: adding or updating tests
- [ ] docs: documentation changes
- [ ] chore: tooling, CI, or build changes

## Definition of Done checklist

- [ ] Builds warning-free (`cargo build` + `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] Formatted (`cargo fmt --check`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] Conformance cases added/updated for new or changed behavior
- [ ] Public items documented (`///`); docs updated if architecture/behavior changed
- [ ] Diagnostics (if any) have `explain` entries and match documented `help:` text
- [ ] Decision-log entry added if this is a spec deviation or RFC outcome
